description:
Make your own story. User-friendly software for LLM roleplaying

RisuAI, or Risu for short, is a cross platform AI chatting software / web application with powerful features such as multiple API support, assets in the chat, regex functions and much more.
- Added {{metadata::A}} CBS
- Added {{iserror::A}} CBS
- Added {{displayescapedcurlybracketopen}}, {{displayescapedcurlybracketclose}}, {{doubledisplayescapedcurlybracketopen}}, {{doubledisplayescapedcurlybracketclose}} CBS for displaying curly brackets.
  - short alias: {{decbo}}, {{decbc}}, {{bo}}, {{bc}}
- Added @@keep_activate_after_match decorator
  - This will force activation after the match
- Added @@dont_activate_after_match decorator
  - This will force deactivation after the match
- Added @@recursive and @@unrecursive decorator
  - Although it was already doable by combining other decorators, this will make it more readable and performant.
- Added @@no_recursive_search decorator
  - This will make the lorebook entry unsearchable via other lorebook entries' content
- Added non-underbar syntax for all functions with an underscore
